//: This is an example configuration file for Production environment
Copy this to appsettings.Production.json and adjust the values

KeepAlive.//: If not set, will use ASPNETCORE_URLS or default to http://localhost:5000
For HTTPS with IP address (like https://192.168.1.100:5001), set SkipCertificateValidation to true

//: PollingIntervalSeconds = delay between cycles, StartupDelaySeconds = initial warm-up delay, RunInParallel = run the 6 jobs concurrently (each in its own DI scope). Keep RunInParallel=false unless validated on a test server.
